versions.version_description: Drop D tuning. Capo for original key of recording. Makes it a lot easier to play this song.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
[Intro]
8 takter x [ch]Dm[/ch]  
   
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Mississippi in the middle of a dry spell;[/tab]
Jimmy Rodgers on the victola up high.
Mama's dancin' baby on her shoulders,
The sun is settin' like molasses in the sky.
[tab][ch]Asus[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Gsus[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
The boy could soon know how to move everything;[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fsus[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]Csus[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
Always wanting more, he'd leave you longing for.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                     [ch]Csus[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Black Velvet in that little boy's smile.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                         [ch]D#[/ch]   [ch]A#[/ch]
Black velvet in with that slow southern style.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
A new religion that'll bring you to your knees,[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch]
Black velvet, if you please.[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Up in Memphis the music's like a heat wave,[/tab]
White lightening, bound to drive you wild.
Mama's baby's in the heart of every school girl,
Love me tender leaves 'em cryin' in the aisles.
[tab][ch]Asus[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]Gsus[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
The way he moved it was a sin so sweet and true,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fsus[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]Csus[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch] 
Always wanting more, he'd leave you longing for.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                     [ch]Csus[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Black Velvet in that little boy's smile.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                         [ch]D#[/ch]   [ch]A#[/ch]
Black velvet in with that slow southern style.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
A new religion that'll bring you to your knees,[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch]
Black velvet, if you please.[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Every word of every song that he sang was for you.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                 [ch]D#[/ch]                   [ch]A#[/ch]
In a flash he was gone, it happened so soon. (Break 2 takter!)[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Dm[/ch]
What could you dooooooooooo-?[/tab]

[Solo] 
8 TAKTER [ch]Dm[/ch]

[Chorus] (x2)
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                     [ch]Csus[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Black Velvet in that little boy's smile.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                         [ch]D#[/ch]   [ch]A#[/ch]
Black velvet in with that slow southern style.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
A new religion that'll bring you to your knees,[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch]
Black velvet, if you please.[/tab]

[Outro] 
8 takter [ch]Dm[/ch]
